scripts.deploy: VITE_API_BASE=https://stock-analytics-v2-worker.acejou27.workers.dev vite build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name stock-analytics-v2
scripts.deploy:sentry: test -n "$SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN" || (echo "SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN is required for Sentry source map upload" >&2; exit 1); test -n "$VITE_SENTRY_DSN" || (echo "VITE_SENTRY_DSN is required for Sentry runtime initialization" >&2; exit 1); export VITE_SENTRY_RELEASE=${VITE_SENTRY_RELEASE:-$(git rev-parse HEAD)} VITE_SENTRY_ENVIRONMENT=${VITE_SENTRY_ENVIRONMENT:-production} SENTRY_ORG=${SENTRY_ORG:-zhenheai} SENTRY_PROJECT=${SENTRY_PROJECT:-stock-analyticsv2-web} && VITE_API_BASE=https://stock-analytics-v2-worker.acejou27.workers.dev vite build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name stock-analytics-v2
